name: GrayDraft Style (notebook + Agent)
author: GrayDraft
description: Shared typography and card layout for HTML notebooks; provides an Agent HTML/CSS contract so the model emits matching class names.

agent.skillSummary: 根容器用 `gd-style-doc`（常配合 `graydraft-document`）。卡片用 `gd-card`，次要文字用 `gd-muted`。列表用原生 `ul`/`ol`/`li`；紧凑列表容器加 `gd-list--tight`，无符号列表用 `gd-list--plain`。表格包在 `gd-table-wrap` 内，表头用 `thead`/`th`，斑马纹表加 `gd-table--striped`，数字列单元格可加 `gd-num`。不要外链 CSS/JS，不要内联事件属性。
